mapper.select: SELECT SEQ , CUR_HP , CUR_HP_EXT , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , REWARD , ATK_RATE , ATK_POWER , DEF_RATE , DEF_POWER , EVADE_RATE , CRIT_DEF_RATE , DEBUFF , DEBUFF1 , DEBUFF2 , HIDE_RULE , PATTERN , REWARD_TYPE , BOSS_TYPE , to_char(INSERT_DATE, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AS START_DATE , to_char(CLOSE_DATE, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AS CLOSE_DATE FROM ( SELECT SEQ , CUR_HP , CUR_HP_EXT , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , REWARD , ATK_RATE , ATK_POWER , DEF_RATE , DEF_POWER , EVADE_RATE , CRIT_DEF_RATE , DEBUFF , DEBUFF1 , DEBUFF2 , HIDE_RULE , PATTERN , REWARD_TYPE , BOSS_TYPE , INSERT_DATE , CLOSE_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS WHERE END_YN = '0' ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: /* reduceHellBossInsertDate */ UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS SET INSERT_DATE = GREATEST(SYSDATE, INSERT_DATE - NUMTODSINTERVAL(14, 'SECOND')) WHERE SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS WHERE END_YN = '0' ) AND INSERT_DATE > SYSDATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(300, 'SECOND')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG (USER_NAME ,ROOM_NAME ,LV ,TARGET_MON_LV ,GAIN_EXP ,ATK_DMG ,MON_DMG ,ATK_CRIT_YN ,MON_PATTEN ,INSERT_DATE ,KILL_YN ,NOW_YN ,DROP_YN ,DEATH_YN ,LUCKY_YN ,BUFF_YN ,JOB_SKILL_YN ,JOB ,NIGHTMARE_YN) VALUES (#{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{roomName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{lv, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,999 ,0 ,#{atkDmg, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{monDmg, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{atkCritYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'0' ,SYSDATE ,#{killYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,'0' ,#{job, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'2')
mapper.select: SELECT sum(cnt) over() as tot_cnt, A.* FROM ( SELECT user_name , count(user_name) as cnt , SUM(atk_dmg) AS score , MAX(atk_dmg) AS max_dmg , ROUND(AVG(atk_dmg)) AS avg_dmg FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE nightmare_yn = '2' AND target_mon_lv = 999 AND atk_dmg > 0 AND insert_date >= to_date(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') GROUP BY user_name ORDER BY SUM(atk_dmg) DESC ) A

SELECT sum(cnt) over() as tot_cnt, A.* FROM ( SELECT user_name , count(user_name) as cnt , SUM(atk_dmg) AS score FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG b WHERE nightmare_yn = '2' AND target_mon_lv = 999 AND atk_dmg > 0 AND insert_date >= to_date(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.ITEM_ID) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY i WHERE i.user_name = b.user_name AND i.item_id BETWEEN 7000 AND 7999 AND NVL(i.del_yn, '0') = '0' AND i.gain_type = 'BOSS_HELL' ) < 2 GROUP BY user_name ORDER BY count(user_name) DESC ) A

/* selectHellLotteryPool */ SELECT DISTINCT b.USER_NAME FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG b JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_USER u ON u.USER_NAME = b.USER_NAME WHERE b.NIGHTMARE_YN = '2' AND b.KILL_YN = '1' AND b.INSERT_DATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 3 AND u.PROC_DATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 3 ORDER BY b.USER_NAME

SELECT SEQ , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , START_DATE , END_DATE FROM ( SELECT SEQ , MAX_HP , MAX_HP_EXT , to_char(INSERT_DATE, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AS START_DATE , to_char(PROC_DATE, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') AS END_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS WHERE END_YN = '1' ORDER BY PROC_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME, ATK_DMG, MON_DMG, ATK_CRIT_YN, KILL_YN, JOB, INSERT_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE NIGHTMARE_YN = '2' AND TARGET_MON_LV = 999 AND INSERT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss') ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_NAME) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE NIGHTMARE_YN = '2' AND TARGET_MON_LV = 999 AND INSERT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss')

SELECT USER_NAME , ITEM_ID , REWARD_DATE FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME , ITEM_ID , to_char(INSERT_DATE, 'mm/dd hh24:mi') AS REWARD_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE GAIN_TYPE = 'BOSS_HELL' ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT USER_NAME , SCORE , REWARD_DATE FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME , SCORE , to_char(INSERT_DATE, 'mm/dd hh24:mi') AS REWARD_DATE FROM (SELECT USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME, SCORE, SCORE_EXT, INSERT_DATE, CMD, NEW_YN FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK UNION ALL SELECT USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME, SCORE, SCORE_EXT, INSERT_DATE, CMD, NEW_YN FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK_OLD) WHERE CMD IN ('BOSS_HELL_KILL_GP', 'BOSS_HELL_NO_ITEM_GP') AND NEW_YN = '2' ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

/* selectHellItemOwners */ SELECT USER_NAME FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE ITEM_ID BETWEEN 7000 AND 7999 AND NVL(DEL_YN, '0') = '0' AND GAIN_TYPE = 'BOSS_HELL' GROUP BY USER_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID) >= 2

SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(ATK_DMG)), 0) FROM ( SELECT ATK_DMG FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE NIGHTMARE_YN = '2' AND TARGET_MON_LV = 999 AND ATK_DMG > 0 ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 200
mapper.update: UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS SET END_YN = '1' , PROC_DATE = SYSDATE , CLOSE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND END_YN = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS (SEQ ,INSERT_DATE ,END_YN ,ATK_RATE ,ATK_POWER ,DEF_RATE ,DEF_POWER ,EVADE_RATE ,CRIT_DEF_RATE ,DEBUFF ,DEBUFF1 ,DEBUFF2 ,REWARD ,MAX_HP ,MAX_HP_EXT ,CUR_HP ,CUR_HP_EXT ,HIDE_RULE ,PATTERN ,REWARD_TYPE ,BOSS_TYPE ,CLOSE_DATE) SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 ,TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') ,'0' ,#{atkRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{atkPower, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{defRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{defPower, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{evadeRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{critDefRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,0 ,0 ,0 ,0 ,#{maxHp, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ,#{maxHpExt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,0 ,null ,#{hideRule, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'없음' ,#{rewardType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,'카운트업' ,TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') + INTERVAL '2' HOUR FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS
mapper.update: /* reduceCountUpCloseDate */ UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS SET CLOSE_DATE = GREATEST(SYSDATE, CLOSE_DATE - NUMTODSINTERVAL(30, 'SECOND')) WHERE END_YN = '0' AND BOSS_TYPE = '카운트업'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ATK_CNT, MIN(INSERT_DATE) AS FIRST_ATK, MAX(INSERT_DATE) AS LAST_ATK FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE NIGHTMARE_YN = '2' AND TARGET_MON_LV = 999 AND ATK_DMG > 0 AND INSERT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss')

SELECT NVL(SUM(ATK_DMG), 0) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND NIGHTMARE_YN = '2' AND TARGET_MON_LV = 999 AND ATK_DMG > 0 AND INSERT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{bossStartDate}, 'yyyymmdd hh24miss')
mapper.update: /* masterRespawnBossNow */ UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS SET INSERT_DATE = SYSDATE , CLOSE_DATE = CASE WHEN BOSS_TYPE = '카운트업' THEN SYSDATE + INTERVAL '2' HOUR ELSE CLOSE_DATE END WHERE END_YN = '0' AND INSERT_DATE > SYSDATE
UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_BOSS SET END_YN = '1' , PROC_DATE = SYSDATE , CLOSE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE END_YN = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT r.USER_NAME, r.SCORE AS gp, r.INSERT_DATE, b.cnt, b.score AS total_dmg FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK r JOIN ( SELECT USER_NAME, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(ATK_DMG) AS score FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE NIGHTMARE_YN = '2' AND TARGET_MON_LV = 999 AND ATK_DMG > 0 AND INSERT_DATE >= ( SELECT MIN(INSERT_DATE) - 3/24 FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE CMD = 'SUCCUBUS_KILL_GP' AND NEW_YN = '2' AND INSERT_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(INSERT_DATE) FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE CMD = 'SUCCUBUS_KILL_GP' AND NEW_YN = '2' AND INSERT_DATE >= SYSDATE - 30 ) ) GROUP BY USER_NAME ) b ON b.USER_NAME = r.USER_NAME WHERE r.CMD = 'SUCCUBUS_KILL_GP' AND r.NEW_YN = '2' AND r.INSERT_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(INSERT_DATE) FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE CMD = 'SUCCUBUS_KILL_GP' AND NEW_YN = '2' AND INSERT_DATE >= SYSDATE - 30 ) ORDER BY r.SCORE DESC
